title: Bengal Polls: Mamata-Abhishek, Shah Steer Parallel 'War Rooms'
description: Sporadic violence, intimidation and assaults on BJP candidates cast a shadow over polling in several pockets, as West Bengal recorded brisk voting in the first phase of the assembly elections on Thursday, with turnout climbing to 78.77 per cent of 3.60 crore electors by 3 pm
